title: Transsector Lines Ltd.
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Transsector Lines Ltd.''' was an independent company that specialized in transporting cargo between different [[Sector/Legends|sectors]]. It was based on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of [[Elrood/Legends|Elrood]] where their company's headquarters was located in the [[City/Legends|city]] of [[Dinbar/Legends|Dinbar]], but they also maintained service locations in a variety of locations including the [[Perma (buildings)|Perma]] of the [[Elrood Bazaar]]. The people of Elrood depended on the company for transport of goods from the planet of [[Torina]], as the company made regular runs through this route.

{{Company-stub}}

==Sources==
*<!-- 1993-09-XX -->''[[Planets of the Galaxy, Volume Three]]''
*<!-- 1994-11-XX -->''[[The Star Wars Planets Collection]]''
